analysis.consistency: The data appears internally consistent. Spell components (V, S, M), range, casting time, and damage scaling are clearly defined and follow typical D&D 5e spell structure.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is comprehensive, detailing the effect on creatures, nonmagical objects, magical force creations, and the implications of disintegration (dust remains, restoration requirements). The 'At Higher Levels' scaling is clearly articulated.

mechanics.effect_on_zero_hp: Disintegration (reduced to fine gray dust, except magic items). Restoration requires True Resurrection or Wish.

scaling.mechanism: Damage increase per spell slot level above 6th
